description_long: This yacht features a modern, angular hull with a light gray upper deck and a contrasting beige staircase leading from the lower to the upper level. The hull is broad and flat-bottomed, providing stability, and the deck is elevated above the waterline with a single central support. The staircase is enclosed with vertical railings, and the deck has a cutout section, possibly for access or a cockpit area. The yacht's design is minimalistic, with clean lines and no visible windows or doors on the cabin structure. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on geometric forms and open space.
description: A modern, angular yacht with a flat gray deck, beige staircase, and minimalistic design featuring clean lines and open space.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central staircase ascending to the deck and the open area beneath the elevated hull.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular shape of the hull and the vertical railings enclosing the staircase.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the broad, flat deck and the open cutout section near the center.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the staircase's descent from the deck and the yacht's elevated structure.
attribute_hull_design: The hull is a monohull with a broad, flat-bottomed configuration and angular sides. It is light gray in color with no visible keels, chines, or markings.
attribute_deck_layout: The deck is elevated and flat, featuring a central staircase with beige railings leading up from below. There is a cutout section in the deck, possibly for access or cockpit, and the deck is open with no visible seating or equipment.
attribute_cabin_structure: No enclosed cabin structure is visible; the deck appears open with no windows or doors, and the only structural feature is the staircase and its railings.
